metadata.description: Master code-generation manifest for eShopOnWeb rebuilt from Graphify pipeline. Covers all domain entities, aggregates, services, APIs, modules, infrastructure, and security nodes across 5 generation waves.

supplementary_docs.FE-17: Secret externalisation — move JWT key and default passwords to environment variables or Azure Key Vault
supplementary_docs.FE-18: Health checks — add liveness/readiness endpoints for Web, PublicApi, and BlazorAdmin
supplementary_docs.FE-19: Caching configuration — IMemoryCache (30s sliding) for Web MVC; Blazored.LocalStorage (1-minute TTL) for BlazorAdmin
supplementary_docs.FE-20: Docker/CI/CD/Azure — docker-compose.yml, GitHub Actions pipeline, Azure deployment manifests

metadata.disc_001_warning: DISC-001: Stock fields (UnitsInStock, UnitsOnOrder, RestockThreshold, OnReorder) are ABSENT from the real eShopOnWeb source code. Do NOT replicate these fields in the generated CatalogItem entity. Only AvailableStock, RestockThreshold, and MaxStockThreshold are present in the actual schema.
generation_rules: GR-01: All generated entity classes must inherit from BaseEntity (DATA-ENT-013) unless they are value objects or owned entities.
GR-02: CatalogItem must NOT include UnitsInStock, UnitsOnOrder, or OnReorder fields (DISC-001).
GR-03: BuyerAggregate and PaymentMethod are DORMANT — generate scaffold only, no active service wiring.
GR-04: ARCH-VIOL-001 through ARCH-VIOL-007 must be resolved before wave generation: endpoints must go through application service interfaces, not EfRepository directly.
GR-05: JWT signing key must be externalised via environment variable or Key Vault — never hardcoded (ARCH-VIOL-004 / AO-03).
GR-06: Task.Delay(1000) in CatalogItemListPagedEndpoint must be removed (AO-04).
GR-07: HTTPS/HSTS must be enforced in production startup (AO-09).
GR-08: Target stack dotnet8 is RESOLVED — all generated projects target net8.0.

gr08_gate.description: Target stack must be resolved before Wave 1 code generation begins. All generated project files, SDK references, and runtime targets depend on this decision.
gr08_gate.resolution: dotnet8 selected as target stack based on TECH-CUR-001 (.NET 8 / ASP.NET Core SDK 8.0.x, LTS until November 2026) and TECH-CUR-002 (C# 12 / LangVersion=latest). All generated .csproj files will target net8.0. LangVersion will be set to latest to enable C# 12 features.

fe_doc_descriptions.FE-01: Project structure — solution file, .csproj files for all 6 deployable units, global.json pinning SDK
fe_doc_descriptions.FE-02: Shared kernel — BaseEntity, ValueObject, GuardExtensions, IAggregateRoot, IDomainEvent
fe_doc_descriptions.FE-03: EF Core contexts — CatalogContext and AppIdentityDbContext with connection strings, HiLo sequences
fe_doc_descriptions.FE-04: Entity configurations — IEntityTypeConfiguration classes for all domain entities

fe_doc_descriptions.FE-05: DDD aggregates — BasketAggregate, OrderAggregate, CatalogAggregate root classes with invariant enforcement
fe_doc_descriptions.FE-06: Catalog entities — CatalogItem (no DISC-001 fields), CatalogBrand, CatalogType with full property set
fe_doc_descriptions.FE-07: BuyerAggregate scaffold — Buyer and PaymentMethod classes (DORMANT — no service wiring)
fe_doc_descriptions.FE-08: Guard extensions — GuardExtensions.cs with NullOrEmpty, NegativeOrZero, EmptyBasketOnCheckout, and custom guards

fe_doc_descriptions.FE-09: Basket/Order services — BasketService, BasketQueryService, OrderService, GetMyOrdersHandler, GetOrderDetailsHandler
fe_doc_descriptions.FE-10: Catalog services — CatalogViewModelService, CachedCatalogViewModelService (30s IMemoryCache), CachedCatalogItemServiceDecorator (1-min localStorage)
fe_doc_descriptions.FE-11: BlazorAdmin services — CustomAuthStateProvider (60s poll), BlazorAdmin catalog service wiring
fe_doc_descriptions.FE-12: Application layer wiring — DI registrations, MediatR pipeline, service interfaces in ApplicationCore

wave_execution_order.gate_condition: Wave 2 complete; all domain entities and aggregates generated

fe_doc_descriptions.FE-13: Repository implementations — EfRepository<T>, CachedRepository decorator, UriComposer
fe_doc_descriptions.FE-14: REST endpoints — all 8 APP-API endpoints; AO-04: Task.Delay(1000) removed from CatalogItemListPagedEndpoint
fe_doc_descriptions.FE-15: JWT/Identity — IdentityTokenClaimService with externalised secret (AO-03); AppIdentityDbContextSeed with idempotent role creation (AO-09 analogue)
fe_doc_descriptions.FE-16: Auth/CORS startup — Startup.cs / Program.cs auth middleware, CORS policy (no wildcard in prod), HTTPS/HSTS enforcement (AO-09)

wave_execution_order.gate_condition: Wave 3 complete; ARCH-VIOL-003 (Task.Delay), ARCH-VIOL-004 (JWT secret), ARCH-VIOL-009 (rate limiting), ARCH-VIOL-011 (CORS) resolved

fe_doc_descriptions.FE-17: Secret externalisation — appsettings.json templates, Key Vault integration, environment variable binding for JWT key and seed passwords
fe_doc_descriptions.FE-18: Health checks — /health/live and /health/ready endpoints for Web, PublicApi; DB ping checks
fe_doc_descriptions.FE-19: Caching configuration — IMemoryCache registration (Web MVC 30s sliding), Blazored.LocalStorage (BlazorAdmin 1-min TTL)
fe_doc_descriptions.FE-20: Docker/CI/CD/Azure — docker-compose.yml, Dockerfile for Web and PublicApi, GitHub Actions workflow, Azure deployment parameters

wave_execution_order.gate_condition: Wave 4 complete; ARCH-VIOL-005 (HTTPS), ARCH-VIOL-007 (health checks), ARCH-VIOL-008 (logging) resolved

generation_nodes.name: Catalogue Discovery (Paged Browse)
generation_nodes.notes: Maps to ICatalogViewModelService.GetCatalogItems. BIZ-RULE-009 defect (Task.Delay) must be removed per AO-04.

generation_nodes.name: Single Product Retrieval
generation_nodes.notes: Must route through ICatalogService interface, not EfRepository directly (resolves ARCH-VIOL-002).

generation_nodes.name: Admin Catalogue Product Creation
generation_nodes.notes: Requires [Authorize(Roles='ADMINISTRATORS')]. Must use ICatalogService, not EfRepository (resolves ARCH-VIOL-003). BIZ-RULE-020, BIZ-RULE-021, BIZ-RULE-022 enforced via guard clauses.

generation_nodes.name: Admin Catalogue Product Update
generation_nodes.notes: Requires [Authorize(Roles='ADMINISTRATORS')]. Must use ICatalogService (resolves ARCH-VIOL-005). BIZ-RULE-021, BIZ-RULE-022 enforced.

generation_nodes.name: Admin Catalogue Product Deletion
generation_nodes.notes: Requires [Authorize(Roles='ADMINISTRATORS')]. Must use ICatalogService (resolves ARCH-VIOL-004).

generation_nodes.name: Brand List Retrieval
generation_nodes.notes: Must use ICatalogService (resolves ARCH-VIOL-001). Public endpoint, no auth required.

generation_nodes.name: Type List Retrieval
generation_nodes.notes: Must use ICatalogService (resolves ARCH-VIOL-006). Public endpoint, no auth required.

generation_nodes.name: Admin Browser-Cached Catalogue View
generation_nodes.notes: 1-minute localStorage TTL (BIZ-RULE-010). Write-through invalidation on create/edit/delete. Uses Blazored.LocalStorage.

generation_nodes.name: Database Catalogue Seeding
generation_nodes.notes: BIZ-RULE-031: seeds 5 brands, 4 types, 12 products if empty. BIZ-RULE-036: 10-retry logic on DB failure.

generation_nodes.name: Basket Item Addition
generation_nodes.notes: BIZ-RULE-004: default quantity 1. Auto-merge anonymous basket items on login (BIZ-RULE-002). Price locked at add time.

generation_nodes.name: Basket Deletion
generation_nodes.notes: BIZ-RULE-003: basket permanently deleted after order placed.

generation_nodes.name: Anonymous-to-User Basket Transfer
generation_nodes.notes: BIZ-RULE-002: Web login path only (NOT API login). BIZ-RULE-017: transfer only if cookie value is valid GUID.

generation_nodes.name: Basket Item Quantity Update
generation_nodes.notes: BIZ-RULE-026: checkout form submission updates quantities before order creation.

generation_nodes.name: Basket Item Count Query
generation_nodes.notes: Read-only query service for basket item count display in header.

generation_nodes.name: Basket View with Product Details
generation_nodes.notes: Joins basket items with current catalog item details for display. Separate from BasketService.

generation_nodes.name: Get or Create Basket
generation_nodes.notes: Creates new basket if none exists for the buyer ID.

generation_nodes.name: Order Creation from Basket
generation_nodes.notes: BIZ-RULE-001: snapshot product name/picture at purchase. BIZ-RULE-003: basket deleted post-order. BIZ-RULE-015: hardcoded shipping address to be replaced with collected address (AO-01 roadmap item).

generation_nodes.name: Order Total Calculation
generation_nodes.notes: BIZ-RULE-012: Order.Total() method. Orders are immutable once created — no status lifecycle.

generation_nodes.name: Order History Retrieval
generation_nodes.notes: BIZ-RULE-030: shoppers view own orders only. MediatR handler pattern.

generation_nodes.name: Order Detail View
generation_nodes.notes: BIZ-RULE-030: returns not-found for orders belonging to other accounts.

generation_nodes.name: User Authentication (Web Storefront)
generation_nodes.notes: BIZ-RULE-025: lockout on failed attempts. Triggers basket transfer (BIZ-CAP-012) on successful login. ASP.NET Core Identity SignInManager.

generation_nodes.name: User Authentication (API — JWT Issue)
generation_nodes.notes: BIZ-RULE-007: JWT with user name and role claims. BIZ-RULE-025: lockout enabled. Does NOT trigger basket transfer. BIZ-RULE-024: 7-day token expiry.

generation_nodes.name: JWT Token Generation
generation_nodes.notes: BIZ-RULE-032: JWT key must be externalised — not hardcoded. AO-03 resolves this. 7-day expiry (BIZ-RULE-024). BLOCKED until ARCH-VIOL-004 resolved.

generation_nodes.name: New User Registration
generation_nodes.notes: BIZ-RULE-027: email confirmation not enforced (compliance gap — AO-02, AO-08 roadmap). BIZ-RULE-028: email + password 6-100 chars + confirm.

generation_nodes.name: BlazorAdmin Authentication State (60s poll)
generation_nodes.notes: 60-second polling interval for JWT auth state in BlazorAdmin. JWT stored in localStorage (XSS risk — TD-03, noted but out of scope for current waves).

generation_nodes.name: Identity and Role Seeding
generation_nodes.notes: BIZ-RULE-013: hardcoded seed passwords must be externalised. BIZ-RULE-037: role creation must be wrapped in existence check to prevent duplicate errors on restart.

generation_nodes.name: Email Notification (Stub — Non-Functional)
generation_nodes.notes: BIZ-RULE-008: stub returns Task.CompletedTask. Status NON-FUNCTIONAL. Real implementation deferred to AO-02 roadmap item.

generation_nodes.name: Generic Data Repository (EF Core)
generation_nodes.notes: ARCH-VIOL-001 through ARCH-VIOL-007: 6 API endpoints must be refactored to use IRepository interface before generation. Coupling score 16 (ARCH-VIOL-009).

generation_nodes.name: Database Seed and Migration on Startup
generation_nodes.notes: BIZ-RULE-036: 10-retry logic. BIZ-RULE-037: idempotent role seeding. Seeds called from Program.cs startup.

generation_nodes.name: Buyer Account Structure (DORMANT)
generation_nodes.notes: BIZ-RULE-035: DORMANT — no active service layer. Generate scaffold only. ARCH-VIOL-006: BuyerAggregate not implemented. No DbSet in CatalogContext.

generation_nodes.name: Payment Method Record (DORMANT)
generation_nodes.notes: BIZ-RULE-034: PCI-compliant token only (no raw card data). DORMANT — generate scaffold with PCI comment. Activate in future wave when payment processing integrated (AO-05).

generation_nodes.name: CatalogItem
generation_nodes.notes: DISC-001: Do NOT include UnitsInStock, UnitsOnOrder, OnReorder. Include: Id, Name, Description, Price, PictureUri, CatalogTypeId, CatalogBrandId, AvailableStock, RestockThreshold, MaxStockThreshold. HiLo sequence catalog_hilo.

generation_nodes.name: CatalogBrand
generation_nodes.notes: Brand field: nvarchar(100) — NOT nvarchar(max) (CORRECTED-1). HiLo sequence catalog_brand_hilo.

generation_nodes.name: CatalogType
generation_nodes.notes: Type field: nvarchar(100) — NOT nvarchar(max) (CORRECTED-1). HiLo sequence catalog_type_hilo.

generation_nodes.name: Basket
generation_nodes.notes: Aggregate root for BasketAggregate. BuyerId: nvarchar(256) — GUID for anonymous, username for authenticated. PII-07.

generation_nodes.name: BasketItem
generation_nodes.notes: UnitPrice locked at basket-add time. CatalogItemId is soft reference — no DB FK confirmed. Quantity >= 0.

generation_nodes.name: Order
generation_nodes.notes: Immutable after creation. BuyerId: nvarchar(256) NOT NULL (PII-05). OrderDate auto-set. ShipToAddress owned entity (PII-06). BIZ-RULE-012: no status field.

generation_nodes.name: OrderItem
generation_nodes.notes: ItemOrdered_CatalogItemId is snapshot reference — no DB FK (intentional). Immutable. UnitPrice decimal(18,2).

generation_nodes.name: Buyer
generation_nodes.notes: DORMANT — not persisted (no DbSet in CatalogContext). Generate scaffold only. IdentityGuid matches Order.BuyerId by value convention — no DB FK. Activate when payment processing integrated.

generation_nodes.name: PaymentMethod
generation_nodes.notes: DORMANT — not persisted. PCI-compliant: store only CardId (token), Alias, Last4. Never store raw card data. PCI comment from PaymentMethod.cs:7 referencing Stripe must be preserved.

generation_nodes.name: ApplicationUser
generation_nodes.notes: Extends IdentityUser. PII-01 (Email HIGH), PII-02 (UserName MEDIUM), PII-03 (PasswordHash HIGH), PII-04 (PhoneNumber MEDIUM). Table: AspNetUsers.

generation_nodes.name: Address
generation_nodes.notes: Owned entity — inlined into Orders as ShipToAddress_* columns. Max lengths: postcode 18, street 180, state 60, country 90, city 100 (BIZ-RULE-033). PII-06.

generation_nodes.name: CatalogItemOrdered
generation_nodes.notes: Value object capturing product state at purchase (BIZ-RULE-001). Immutable. Inlined into OrderItems as ItemOrdered_* columns. Immune to future catalogue changes.

generation_nodes.name: BaseEntity
generation_nodes.notes: Abstract base class with int Id. Parent of all domain entities. No DB table — not persisted directly.

generation_nodes.name: BasketAggregate
generation_nodes.notes: Aggregate root: Basket (DATA-ENT-004). Children: BasketItem (DATA-ENT-005). Domain invariants enforced in Basket aggregate methods.

generation_nodes.name: OrderAggregate
generation_nodes.notes: Aggregate root: Order (DATA-ENT-006). Children: OrderItem, Address (owned), CatalogItemOrdered (value object). BIZ-RULE-001 snapshot invariant enforced here.

generation_nodes.name: BuyerAggregate (DORMANT)
generation_nodes.notes: DORMANT. No DbSet in CatalogContext. No active service layer. Generate scaffold only. ARCH-VIOL-006 requires this to be acknowledged before Wave 2 generation.

generation_nodes.name: CatalogAggregate (standalone entities)
generation_nodes.notes: Aggregate root: CatalogItem (DATA-ENT-001). Children: CatalogBrand (DATA-ENT-002), CatalogType (DATA-ENT-003). DISC-001: No UnitsInStock, UnitsOnOrder, OnReorder fields.

generation_nodes.name: CatalogDatabase (CatalogContext)
generation_nodes.notes: Connection key: CatalogConnection. Technology: SQL Server. Tables: Catalog, CatalogBrands, CatalogTypes, Baskets, BasketItems, Orders, OrderItems. HiLo sequences for CatalogItem/Brand/Type; IDENTITY for Basket/Order.

generation_nodes.name: IdentityDatabase (AppIdentityDbContext)
generation_nodes.notes: Connection key: IdentityConnection. Technology: SQL Server. Extends IdentityDbContext<ApplicationUser>. Tables: AspNetUsers, AspNetRoles, AspNetUserRoles, AspNetUserClaims, AspNetRoleClaims, AspNetUserLogins, AspNetUserTokens.

generation_nodes.name: Web MVC IMemoryCache (Catalog Browse)
generation_nodes.notes: Technology: ASP.NET Core IMemoryCache (server-side in-process). TTL: 30 seconds sliding. Decorator pattern over CatalogViewModelService. CacheHelpers.cs for key generation.

generation_nodes.name: BlazorAdmin localStorage Cache (Admin Catalog)
generation_nodes.notes: Technology: Blazored.LocalStorage (browser-side). TTL: 1 minute (DateCreated.AddMinutes(1)). Write-through invalidation on Create/Edit/Delete. TTL-only invalidation for brands/types.

generation_nodes.name: eshopwebmvc (Web MVC Storefront)
generation_nodes.notes: Target: net8.0. Type: ASP.NET Core MVC + Razor Pages + BlazorAdmin WASM Host. Docker port 5106:8080, dev HTTPS 44315. Depends on sqlserver.

generation_nodes.name: eshoppublicapi (PublicApi REST Service)
generation_nodes.notes: Target: net8.0. Type: ASP.NET Core Web API with Ardalis.ApiEndpoints + MinimalAPI + Swagger/OpenAPI. Docker port 5200:8080, dev HTTPS 5099. Depends on sqlserver.

generation_nodes.name: BlazorAdmin (SPA)
generation_nodes.notes: Target: net8.0. Type: Blazor WASM SPA. Embedded in eshopwebmvc. Calls eshoppublicapi cross-origin. JWT stored in localStorage (XSS risk TD-03 — noted).

generation_nodes.name: ApplicationCore (Domain Library)
generation_nodes.notes: Target: net8.0. Type: Domain Library — zero external project references. Clean Architecture core. Contains all domain entities, aggregates, interfaces, and domain services.

generation_nodes.name: Infrastructure (Infrastructure Library)
generation_nodes.notes: Target: net8.0. Type: Infrastructure Library. Contains EF Core contexts, ASP.NET Identity, JWT helpers, repository implementations, and seeding classes.

generation_nodes.name: BlazorShared (Shared Library)
generation_nodes.notes: Target: net8.0. Type: Shared Contracts Library. Note: ApplicationCore references this library — violates Clean Architecture dependency rule (TD-13, ARCH-VIOL-011). Track for future refactoring.

generation_nodes.name: BasketService
generation_nodes.notes: Implements IBasketService. Capabilities: BIZ-CAP-010, BIZ-CAP-011, BIZ-CAP-012, BIZ-CAP-013. Key methods: AddItemToBasket, DeleteBasketAsync, TransferBasketAsync, SetQuantities.

generation_nodes.name: BasketQueryService
generation_nodes.notes: Implements IBasketQueryService. Capability: BIZ-CAP-014. Read-only basket item count query.

generation_nodes.name: BasketViewModelService
generation_nodes.notes: Capabilities: BIZ-CAP-015, BIZ-CAP-016. Joins basket with catalog item details for view rendering. Lives in Web project (view model concern).

generation_nodes.name: OrderService
generation_nodes.notes: Implements IOrderService. Capabilities: BIZ-CAP-017, BIZ-CAP-018. CreateOrderAsync: snapshot product at purchase, delete basket after order saved.

generation_nodes.name: GetMyOrdersHandler
generation_nodes.notes: MediatR handler. Capability: BIZ-CAP-019. Returns orders for authenticated user only (BIZ-RULE-030).

generation_nodes.name: GetOrderDetailsHandler
generation_nodes.notes: MediatR handler. Capability: BIZ-CAP-020. Returns not-found for orders belonging to other accounts (BIZ-RULE-030).

generation_nodes.name: IdentityTokenClaimService
generation_nodes.notes: Implements ITokenClaimService. JWT with user name and role claims. 7-day expiry. JWT key MUST be externalised (AO-03 — resolves ARCH-VIOL-004). BLOCKED until ARCH-VIOL-004 resolved.

generation_nodes.name: EfRepository (Generic Repository)
generation_nodes.notes: Implements IRepository<T> and IReadRepository<T>. ARCH-VIOL-001..007: must be accessed only through interface — endpoints must not reference this class directly. Coupling score 16 (ARCH-VIOL-009).

generation_nodes.name: CachedCatalogItemServiceDecorator
generation_nodes.notes: Decorator for ICatalogItemService. 1-minute localStorage TTL. Write-through cache invalidation on create/edit/delete. Brands/types use TTL-only invalidation.

generation_nodes.name: CatalogContextSeed
generation_nodes.notes: Seeds 5 brands, 4 types, 12 products if empty (BIZ-RULE-031). 10-retry logic on DB failure (BIZ-RULE-036). DISC-001: seeded products must not include stock fields absent from real source.

generation_nodes.name: AppIdentityDbContextSeed
generation_nodes.notes: Seeds ADMINISTRATORS role and demo users. BIZ-RULE-037: MUST wrap role creation in existence check (idempotency fix). BIZ-RULE-013/029: seed passwords must be externalised — not hardcoded in source.

generation_nodes.name: EmailSender (Stub)
generation_nodes.notes: NON-FUNCTIONAL stub. Returns Task.CompletedTask (BIZ-RULE-008). Real implementation deferred to AO-02. Implements IEmailSender interface.

generation_nodes.name: CustomAuthStateProvider
generation_nodes.notes: 60-second polling interval for JWT auth state. Extends AuthenticationStateProvider. JWT stored in localStorage (XSS risk TD-03 — out of scope for current waves).

generation_nodes.name: CachedCatalogViewModelService
generation_nodes.notes: Decorator over ICatalogViewModelService. IMemoryCache 30s sliding TTL (CORRECTED-5). CacheHelpers.cs for key generation. Server-side in-process cache.

generation_nodes.name: POST /api/authenticate
generation_nodes.notes: Issues JWT. No auth required. BIZ-RULE-025: lockout on failed attempts. BLOCKED until ARCH-VIOL-004 (JWT secret externalisation) resolved.

generation_nodes.name: GET /api/catalog-brands
generation_nodes.notes: Public endpoint. Must use ICatalogService/IRepository interface — not EfRepository directly. BLOCKED by ARCH-VIOL-001.

generation_nodes.name: GET /api/catalog-items/{catalogItemId}
generation_nodes.notes: Public endpoint. BLOCKED by ARCH-VIOL-002: must route through application layer interface.

generation_nodes.name: GET /api/catalog-items
generation_nodes.notes: Public endpoint. AO-04: Task.Delay(1000) MUST be removed. BIZ-RULE-009 defect eliminated in generated code. ARCH-VIOL-003: route through ICatalogService.

generation_nodes.name: POST /api/catalog-items
generation_nodes.notes: [Authorize(Roles='ADMINISTRATORS')]. BIZ-RULE-020 (unique name), BIZ-RULE-021 (price > 0), BIZ-RULE-022 (non-empty name/desc), BIZ-RULE-023 (default placeholder image). BLOCKED by ARCH-VIOL-003.

generation_nodes.name: DELETE /api/catalog-items/{catalogItemId}
generation_nodes.notes: [Authorize(Roles='ADMINISTRATORS')]. BLOCKED by ARCH-VIOL-004.

generation_nodes.name: PUT /api/catalog-items
generation_nodes.notes: [Authorize(Roles='ADMINISTRATORS')]. BIZ-RULE-021, BIZ-RULE-022 enforced. BLOCKED by ARCH-VIOL-005.

generation_nodes.name: GET /api/catalog-types
generation_nodes.notes: Public endpoint. BLOCKED by ARCH-VIOL-006: must route through ICatalogService.

generation_nodes.name: Admin
generation_nodes.notes: Boundary: Weak. 23 components, 2 entry points, coupling score 5. Migration readiness: Blocked.

generation_nodes.name: ApplicationCore
generation_nodes.notes: Boundary: Weak. 13 components, 0 entry points. Migration readiness: Blocked. Zero external project references required.

generation_nodes.name: Basket
generation_nodes.notes: Boundary: Weak. 23 components, 3 entry points, coupling score 9. Migration readiness: Blocked.

generation_nodes.name: Catalog
generation_nodes.notes: Boundary: Weak. 66 components, 9 entry points, coupling score 13. Largest module. Migration readiness: Blocked.

generation_nodes.name: CrossCutting
generation_nodes.notes: Boundary: Medium. 10 components, 7 entry points. Migration readiness: Needs Refactoring.

generation_nodes.name: DataAccess
generation_nodes.notes: Boundary: Weak. 2 components, 0 entry points, coupling score 5. Migration readiness: Blocked. ARCH-VIOL-009 high coupling.

generation_nodes.name: Identity
generation_nodes.notes: Boundary: Weak. 66 components, 20 entry points, coupling score 6. Migration readiness: Blocked. JWT externalisation required.

generation_nodes.name: Infrastructure
generation_nodes.notes: Boundary: Medium. 3 components, 0 entry points. Migration readiness: Needs Refactoring.

generation_nodes.name: Order
generation_nodes.notes: Boundary: Weak. 21 components, 2 entry points, coupling score 4. Migration readiness: Blocked.

generation_nodes.name: PublicApi
generation_nodes.notes: Boundary: Strong. 5 components, 0 entry points. Migration readiness: Needs Refactoring. All ARCH-VIOL-001..007 must be resolved before generation.

generation_nodes.name: SharedContracts
generation_nodes.notes: Boundary: Medium. 12 components, 0 entry points. Migration readiness: Needs Refactoring. ARCH-VIOL-011: ApplicationCore references this — track for future refactoring.

generation_nodes.name: Verification (Tests)
generation_nodes.notes: Boundary: Medium. 45 components, 0 entry points. Migration readiness: Needs Refactoring. Integration tests generated after application layer is complete.

generation_nodes.name: Web
generation_nodes.notes: Boundary: Weak. 21 components, 3 entry points, coupling score 5. Migration readiness: Blocked. ARCH-VIOL-007 (IndexModel direct EfRepository) must be resolved.

generation_nodes.name: Role-Based Authorisation (ADMINISTRATORS)
generation_nodes.notes: BIZ-RULE-005: [Authorize(Roles='ADMINISTRATORS')] on all catalog write endpoints. Role string: 'Administrators' (confirmed in source). JWT carries role claims.

generation_nodes.name: ASP.NET Core Identity (Cookie Auth)
generation_nodes.notes: Cookie-based auth for Web MVC storefront. Account lockout enabled (BIZ-RULE-025). SignInManager and UserManager wired. Basket transfer on login (BIZ-CAP-012).

generation_nodes.name: JWT Bearer Auth (PublicApi)
generation_nodes.notes: JWT Bearer auth for PublicApi and BlazorAdmin. 7-day expiry (BIZ-RULE-024). BLOCKED: JWT secret must be externalised before generation (ARCH-VIOL-004, AO-03). Key from environment variable or Key Vault.

generation_nodes.name: JWT Secret Externalisation
generation_nodes.notes: AO-03: Move JWT signing key from hardcoded constant to environment variable / Azure Key Vault. BIZ-RULE-032 security risk resolved. Required before Wave 4 endpoint generation.

generation_nodes.name: CORS Policy Configuration
generation_nodes.notes: ARCH-VIOL-011: No CORS wildcard in production. Dev: allow localhost:5106 and localhost:5200. Prod: strict origin policy. BlazorAdmin needs cross-origin access to PublicApi.

generation_nodes.name: HTTPS and HSTS Enforcement
generation_nodes.notes: AO-09: Enforce UseHttpsRedirection() and UseHsts() in production startup for both Web and PublicApi. Dev environment excluded from HSTS. Resolves ARCH-VIOL-005.

generation_nodes.name: Anonymous Basket Cookie (Essential)
generation_nodes.notes: BIZ-RULE-016: 10-year GUID cookie, marked essential, not subject to consent banners. Must be configured in cookie policy options. PII-07 consideration.

generation_nodes.name: Docker Compose Configuration
generation_nodes.notes: Docker services: eshopwebmvc (5106:8080), eshoppublicapi (5200:8080), sqlserver. Azure SQL Edge container for dev/Docker (EOL — consider upgrading to SQL Server 2022 image).

generation_nodes.name: SQL Server Database Infrastructure
generation_nodes.notes: Two logical databases on same SQL Server instance: CatalogDb and IdentityDb. LocalDB for dev, Azure SQL Edge for Docker, Azure SQL for production. Connection strings via appsettings.

generation_nodes.name: EF Core Migrations
generation_nodes.notes: Initial migration generated via dotnet ef migrations add. CatalogContext and AppIdentityDbContext migrations kept separate. HiLo sequences created in initial migration.

generation_nodes.name: Health Check Endpoints
generation_nodes.notes: AO-07 (ARCH-VIOL-007): Add /health/live and /health/ready endpoints. DB ping checks for CatalogDb and IdentityDb. Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.HealthChecks.EntityFrameworkCore package.

generation_nodes.name: Structured Logging Configuration
generation_nodes.notes: ARCH-VIOL-008: Add structured logging. Serilog or Microsoft.Extensions.Logging with structured output. Correlation IDs for distributed tracing. Log PII fields carefully per PII-01..08.

generation_nodes.name: GitHub Actions CI/CD Pipeline
generation_nodes.notes: Build, test, and Docker image push pipeline. dotnet build, dotnet test (integration tests), docker build, push to registry. Azure deployment step parameterised by environment.

architecture_violations.description: CatalogBrandListEndpoint depends directly on EfRepository<CatalogBrand> instead of routing through an application service interface. Web project directly accesses EF Core — violates Clean Architecture layering.
architecture_violations.resolution_action: Introduce ICatalogService.GetBrands() interface in ApplicationCore. CatalogBrandListEndpoint injects ICatalogService, not EfRepository. EfRepository remains in Infrastructure and is never referenced directly from endpoints.

architecture_violations.description: CatalogItemGetByIdEndpoint depends directly on EfRepository<CatalogItem>. Endpoint bypasses the application layer and directly queries the repository.
architecture_violations.resolution_action: Route CatalogItemGetByIdEndpoint through ICatalogItemService.GetById(). Remove direct EfRepository dependency from endpoint constructor.

architecture_violations.description: Mandatory 1-second artificial delay (await Task.Delay(1000)) in CatalogItemListPagedEndpoint on every catalogue browse request. Known production performance defect (BIZ-RULE-009).
architecture_violations.resolution_action: AO-04: Delete the Task.Delay(1000) call from CatalogItemListPagedEndpoint.cs line 42. Do not replicate in generated code.

architecture_violations.description: JWT signing secret key hardcoded as plaintext constant in source code (AuthorizationConstants.cs). Critical security vulnerability — must not be used in production.
architecture_violations.resolution_action: AO-03: Move JWT signing key to environment variable (JWT__Secret) or Azure Key Vault. Bind via IConfiguration in IdentityTokenClaimService. Remove all hardcoded key constants from source code.

architecture_violations.description: HTTPS enforcement and HSTS not enforced in production startup code. Production traffic may be served over plain HTTP.
architecture_violations.resolution_action: AO-09: Add UseHttpsRedirection() and UseHsts() to both Web and PublicApi Program.cs. Exclude HSTS from Development environment. Set HSTS max age to at least 1 year in production.

architecture_violations.description: BuyerAggregate (Buyer + PaymentMethod) is structurally defined but entirely dormant — no active service layer creates, queries, or persists it. Not registered as a DbSet in CatalogContext.
architecture_violations.resolution_action: Generate BuyerAggregate scaffold in Wave 2 with DORMANT annotation. No DbSet registration in CatalogContext until payment processing is integrated (AO-05). Acknowledge gap in generated code comments.

architecture_violations.description: No health check endpoints implemented. Liveness and readiness probes are absent from Web and PublicApi, preventing proper container orchestration and monitoring.
architecture_violations.resolution_action: Add Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.HealthChecks to both Web and PublicApi. Implement /health/live and /health/ready endpoints with SQL Server DB ping checks. Register in Program.cs.

architecture_violations.description: No structured logging implemented. Application relies on default Microsoft.Extensions.Logging without structured output, correlation IDs, or centralised log aggregation.
architecture_violations.resolution_action: Configure Serilog or structured Microsoft.Extensions.Logging with JSON output. Add correlation ID middleware. Ensure PII fields (PII-01..08) are excluded or masked from log output.

architecture_violations.description: No rate limiting applied to PublicApi endpoints. Authentication endpoints (POST /api/authenticate) are vulnerable to brute-force and credential stuffing without rate limiting.
architecture_violations.resolution_action: Add ASP.NET Core rate limiting middleware (Microsoft.AspNetCore.RateLimiting). Apply fixed-window or sliding-window limiter to POST /api/authenticate. Configure limits per IP.

architecture_violations.description: DISC-001 stock fields discrepancy: UnitsInStock, UnitsOnOrder, and OnReorder fields are absent from the real eShopOnWeb source code but may appear in documentation or data architecture assumptions.
architecture_violations.resolution_action: Do NOT generate UnitsInStock, UnitsOnOrder, or OnReorder fields on CatalogItem entity. Only generate AvailableStock, RestockThreshold, and MaxStockThreshold as confirmed in real source. Add DISC-001 comment in generated entity.

architecture_violations.description: CORS wildcard policy used in development without explicit production restriction. BlazorAdmin cross-origin requests to PublicApi lack a strict CORS policy in non-development environments.
architecture_violations.resolution_action: Configure named CORS policies: development policy allows localhost origins (5106, 5200, 44315, 5099); production policy restricts to known origins only. No wildcard (*) in production. Apply via UseCors() in Program.cs.

open_questions.question: Is Order.BuyerId and Basket.BuyerId the user's email address or the ASP.NET Identity GUID? This determines whether PII-05 and PII-07 should be classified as HIGH sensitivity (email) or MEDIUM (GUID). Affects GDPR erasure strategy.
resolution_options: If email: escalate PII sensitivity, add masking in logs, review GDPR erasure path
If GUID: current MEDIUM classification is correct, cross-reference mapping needed for GDPR requests

open_questions.question: Should the generated eShopOnWeb retain the hardcoded shipping address (123 Main St., Kent, OH — BIZ-RULE-015) or implement a real shipping address collection form at checkout? AO-01 recommends collecting the address, but this is a significant scope increase.
resolution_options: Retain hardcoded address (minimal scope — replicate source behaviour)
Implement checkout form with address collection (AO-01 — requires new UI, validation, and entity changes)

open_questions.question: Should the BuyerAggregate (DATA-AGG-003) be activated with a real payment processing integration in the current generation run, or generated as scaffold only (DORMANT) pending AO-05?
resolution_options: DORMANT scaffold only (default — low risk, matches source)
Activate with Stripe/Braintree integration (AO-05 — high effort, out of scope for reverse engineering waves)

open_questions.question: Should the Docker base image be updated from the EOL Azure SQL Edge image to SQL Server 2022 (mcr.microsoft.com/mssql/server:2022-latest) in the generated docker-compose.yml?
resolution_options: Retain Azure SQL Edge (preserve source compatibility)
Upgrade to SQL Server 2022 image (recommended — EOL risk mitigation)

open_questions.question: Should email confirmation be enforced at registration (AO-08) in the generated code, or retained as non-functional stub (BIZ-RULE-027) matching source behaviour? Enforcement requires a real email delivery implementation (AO-02 prerequisite).
resolution_options: Enforce email confirmation (requires AO-02 real email delivery first)

open_questions.question: Should JWT storage in BlazorAdmin be migrated from localStorage to httpOnly cookies to mitigate the XSS risk (TD-03)? This is a known security concern but requires significant architecture change to the BlazorAdmin authentication flow.
resolution_options: Retain localStorage storage (matches source — XSS risk acknowledged in generated code comments)
Migrate to httpOnly cookie (mitigates TD-03 — requires BFF pattern or token relay)

open_questions.question: Should order status lifecycle be added in the generated system (AO-06: PLACED, PROCESSING, SHIPPED, DELIVERED, CANCELLED) or should the current immutable-once-created model (BIZ-RULE-012) be preserved to match the source?
resolution_options: Preserve immutable model (matches source — no status field)
Add status lifecycle (AO-06 — high effort, new domain events required)

open_questions.question: Should the generated ApplicationCore be decoupled from BlazorShared (TD-13, ARCH-VIOL-011) by extracting shared contracts into a separate NuGet package, or should the current project reference be retained to match the source?
resolution_options: Retain current project reference (matches source — violation acknowledged)
Extract to NuGet package or invert dependency (resolves Clean Architecture violation — medium effort)

assumptions.assumption: The target runtime and SDK is .NET 8 (net8.0) with C# 12 (LangVersion=latest), as established by TECH-CUR-001 and TECH-CUR-002. GR-08 is fully resolved.
assumptions.impact: All generated .csproj files target net8.0. C# 12 features (primary constructors, collection expressions) may be used in generated code.

assumptions.assumption: DISC-001 is accurate: UnitsInStock, UnitsOnOrder, and OnReorder fields do NOT exist in the real eShopOnWeb CatalogItem entity. Only AvailableStock, RestockThreshold, and MaxStockThreshold are present.
assumptions.impact: Generated CatalogItem class will contain exactly the confirmed fields. Any documentation or FE prompt referencing absent stock fields will be overridden by this assumption.

assumptions.assumption: The Ardalis.ApiEndpoints pattern (IEndpoint / BaseEndpoint) is used for all PublicApi REST endpoints, consistent with the source code pattern identified in APP-API-001 through APP-API-008.
assumptions.impact: Generated endpoint classes inherit from BaseEndpointWithoutRequest<TResponse> or BaseEndpoint<TRequest, TResponse>. FastEndpoints or MinimalAPI alternatives are not used.

assumptions.assumption: The BuyerAggregate (DATA-AGG-003) will be generated as a scaffold only (no active service layer, no DbSet registration) to match the dormant state confirmed in the source code.
assumptions.impact: Buyer.cs and PaymentMethod.cs are generated with TODO comments indicating dormant state. No EF Core migrations or DbSet entries are created for these entities.

assumptions.assumption: MediatR is used for query/command handlers (GetMyOrdersHandler, GetOrderDetailsHandler), consistent with the handler pattern identified in APP-SVC-005 and APP-SVC-006.
assumptions.impact: Generated handlers implement IRequestHandler<TRequest, TResponse>. MediatR NuGet package included in ApplicationCore and Web project dependencies.

assumptions.assumption: Ardalis.GuardClauses is used for guard clause implementations throughout the domain layer. GuardExtensions.cs extends the base Guard class with custom domain-specific guards.
assumptions.impact: Generated guard clause code uses Guard.Against.* pattern. Custom guards (EmptyBasketOnCheckout, NegativeOrZero, NullOrEmpty) extend Ardalis.GuardClauses.IGuardClause.

assumptions.assumption: Blazored.LocalStorage is the browser-side storage library used for the BlazorAdmin 1-minute TTL cache (CACHE-002). This is a client-side Blazor WASM library.
assumptions.impact: Generated CachedCatalogItemServiceDecorator uses IJSRuntime / ILocalStorageService from Blazored.LocalStorage. Package reference added to BlazorAdmin.csproj.

status_flags.next_action: Resolve ARCH-VIOL-001 (introduce ICatalogService interface, remove direct EfRepository references from endpoints) to unblock Wave 1 generation. Resolve ARCH-VIOL-004 (externalise JWT secret) to unblock Wave 4 generation.
